source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Quiet English document UI with stable tabular numbers, generous review labels, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese document, archive, approval, and metadata screens.
layout: Dense but calm 8px document grids, left navigation rails, review queue cards, file metadata tables, command palettes, soft curd-bead texture samples, leaf-vein separators, restrained 8px cards, and low-contrast dashboard panels.

prompts.label: Transparent cauliflower curd motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Cauliflower Curd transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a cauliflower curd motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete vegetable garden subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A fresh cauliflower head with a compact ivory curd made of tight clustered florets, subtle cream shadows, bumpy bead-like curd texture, pale chartreuse stems barely visible at the base, and green wrapper leaves curling around the curd like protective brackets. The identity must read clearly as cauliflower curd, not broccoli, cabbage, romanesco, lettuce, or a flower bouquet.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the whole rounded curd dome and surrounding wrapper leaves without cropping. Quiet document-system silhouette, botanical realism, clean studio lighting that preserves ivory curd detail and matte leaf texture. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or pattern. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no soil, no garden bed, no basket, no knife, no plate, no hand, no props, no text, no watermark, no sliced cauliflower, no second vegetable species.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cauliflower Curd light-mode design-system board
Input image: the visible transparent cauliflower curd motif is the source reference for palette, texture, forms, spacing rhythm, and icon language.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Cauliflower Curd", derived from the visible cauliflower curd with ivory curd and green wrapper leaves. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible quiet document system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, quiet document workflow mood. Use large legible labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cauliflower Curd, Cauliflower Curd, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language only from ivory cauliflower curd, cream curd highlights, warm curd shadows, pale chartreuse stems, green wrapper leaves, blue-green leaf underside, leaf veins, and tight bead-like floret geometry. The board must read as cauliflower curd, not broccoli, cabbage, romanesco, lettuce, garlic, mushroom, or generic green UI.
Typography: English quiet document system examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use bilingual document, review, archive, status, and table labels with stable tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, document cards, review queue, file metadata rows, table rows, command search palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, filters, status chips, spacing scale, radius samples, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, simple icons, theme token swatches.
Style: quiet document system, precise 8px grid and 8px card radius, ivory paper surfaces, curd-cream muted panels, wrapper-leaf green navigation and success states, pale chartreuse focus rings, blue-green leaf underside secondary controls, warm floret shadow borders, subtle cauliflower bead texture and leaf-vein texture overlays, dense but calm tables and dashboards, polished shadcn/tweakcn component language.
Color palette: use motif-derived colors only: ivory curd, warm cream, curd shadow tan, pale chartreuse, wrapper leaf green, blue-green leaf underside, deep leaf ink, and soft stem highlight. No unrelated colors.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no broccoli identity, no romanesco spiral identity, no cabbage identity, no vegetable photo collage, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Cauliflower Curd", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cauliflower Curd dark-mode design-system board
Input images: the visible transparent cauliflower curd motif and visible light design-system board are references. Preserve the same system identity, layout language, motif-derived palette, and UI coverage.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Cauliflower Curd" / "Cauliflower Curd". Translate the same quiet document system into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation, quiet document workflow mood. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cauliflower Curd, Cauliflower Curd, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve ivory curd highlights for foreground and selected panels, warm curd-shadow borders, wrapper-leaf green active states, pale chartreuse focus rings, blue-green leaf underside secondary controls, deep leaf ink backgrounds, leaf-vein dividers, cauliflower bead texture, calm document cards, review queue, file metadata tables, command search, status chips, charts, and a precise 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. The board must read as cauliflower curd, not broccoli, romanesco, cabbage, lettuce, garlic, mushroom, or generic dark green UI.
Typography: English quiet document UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use compact bilingual document, review, archive, status, and table labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, document cards, review metrics, file metadata table rows, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, sidebar navigation, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, icon set.
Visual details: deep wrapper-leaf ink background, blue-green leaf underside panels, ivory curd text and surfaces, pale curd cream elevated cards, chartreuse focus rings and success chips, warm curd-shadow separators, subtle bead texture overlays, subtle leaf-vein texture overlays, crisp controls and dashboards, restrained contrast, no pure black.
Color palette: use motif-derived colors only: ivory curd, warm cream, curd shadow tan, pale chartreuse, wrapper leaf green, blue-green leaf underside, deep leaf ink, and soft stem highlight. No unrelated colors.
Constraints: no neon green, no generic black-and-green terminal UI, no pure-black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or blue gradient dominance, no broccoli identity, no romanesco spiral identity, no cabbage identity, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Cauliflower Curd", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
